content:
Paid Internship Opportunity Alert - Legal

Vasista Enterprise Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is hiring a Legal Intern to support its intellectual property and technology law-related initiatives. 

The internship offers practical exposure to intellectual property rights, legal research, documentation, and IP portfolio management. 

Location : Hyderabad

Stipend : ₹20,000 per month

Interested candidates can refer to the link for more details https://lnkd.in/gKUQnjZ

Join WhatsApp Group for free and early access to the Daily Job and Internship updates: https://lnkd.in/gP8udJsj

Join Telegram Group for free and early access to the Daily Job and Internship updates: https://lnkd.in/gMXAwDXe
comment: IP internships are most valuable when interns get exposure beyond research—understanding how businesses protect, license, and enforce IP can bridge the gap between legal theory and commercial practice.
